result.stdout:
Description:
  Anino - Mock API Server
  
  A lightweight tool for creating mock REST APIs from JSON configuration files.
  Perfect for frontend development, testing, and prototyping.

Usage:
  Anino [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  server  Start the Anino mock API server
  def     Definition file operations

Commands:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a new sample definition file with common CRUD operations

Usage:
  Anino def new [options]

Options:
  -n, --name      Name of the definition file to generate [default: definition.json]
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate a new sample definition file with common CRUD operations

Usage:
  Anino def new [options]

Options:
  -n, --name      Name of the definition file to generate [default: definition.json]
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Start the Anino mock API server

Usage:
  Anino server [options]

Options:
  -d, --def (REQUIRED)  Path to JSON configuration file
  -p, --port            Server port [default: 7770]
  -l, --latency         Simulated network latency in milliseconds (optional) [default: 0]
  -pp, --proxy          Base URL to forward unmatched requests to (optional)
  -us, --use-secure     Use HTTPS for the mock server when proxy URL is HTTPS (default: true)
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Start the Anino mock API server

Usage:
  Anino server [options]

Options:
  -d, --def (REQUIRED)  Path to JSON configuration file
  -p, --port            Server port [default: 7770]
  -l, --latency         Simulated network latency in milliseconds (optional) [default: 0]
  -pp, --proxy          Base URL to forward unmatched requests to (optional)
  -us, --use-secure     Use HTTPS for the mock server when proxy URL is HTTPS (default: true)
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information
